summary: Strong band performance highlighted by a quirky Supplication > Let It Grow sequence; recording quality not specified.
review: The reviewer praises the band's playing for the era and especially calls out the Supplication > Let It Grow segue as “funny stuff,” indicating it stood out in an otherwise enjoyable party atmosphere at Hampton. No details are given about the source or fidelity of the audio, so the recording quality remains unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 4‑star review emphasizes good musical performance with a notable song sequence; lack of recording comments prevents a higher rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific remarks about soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or other technical aspects.
